description: Security descriptor for TraceMeds Inventory Service

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.InventoryManager
scopes.description: Full access to inventory records, movements, stock actions (reserve, release, dispatch, adjust)

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.InventoryViewer
scopes.description: Read-only access to inventory records and movements

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.SystemAdmin
scopes.description: System administrator — inherits all scopes, access to Products master data

role-templates.name: InventoryManager
role-templates.description: Can create inventory records and perform all stock actions: reserve, release, dispatch, adjustStock

role-templates.name: InventoryViewer
role-templates.description: Read-only access — can view inventory records, movements, expiry reports

role-templates.name: SystemAdmin
role-templates.description: Full system access — inherits InventoryManager and InventoryViewer

role-collections.name: TraceMeds_InventoryManager
role-collections.description: Assign to users who manage physical stock — receive goods, reserve, dispatch, adjust

role-collections.name: TraceMeds_InventoryViewer
role-collections.description: Assign to users who only need to view stock levels and movement history

role-collections.name: TraceMeds_SystemAdmin
role-collections.description: Assign to system administrators — has all permissions across the service
